operation: Full Kingdom Map audit — find ALL bugs, regressions, and issues across the entire kingdom-map stack
learnings: React 19 border/borderLeft shorthand conflict: expanding border shorthand to individual sides + keeping borderLeft explicit fixes the console error. REGRESSION GUARD comment placed in TokenHUD.tsx.

EMISSIVE_FLOOR=0.18 was too low: dark-hued emissives (#7000ff, #9b30ff) disappear in void scene at intensity 0.18. Gold (#f0a500) visible at same intensity due to high luminance — creates false glow differential. Bumped to 0.35 in S166. Archaeological plaque placed.

Forge appearing to glow when house/tower don't: confirmed H2 (color physics). forge_claude was running/85 (correctly bright). tower_claude was online/40 → activityBase=0.20 → invisible with #9b30ff. claude_house was offline/0 → correctly dark (hook file stale >2h). EMISSIVE_FLOOR=0.35 fixes this.
DebugPanel P0 FIXED: TerritoryNode.useFrame now reads store.debugOverrides[territory.id] first. Maps override.status→AgentState, uses override.activity. Archaeological plaque placed.
SignalPulse O(n) .find() fixed: pulseMapRef (Map<string, PulseInstance>) added for O(1) lookup in useFrame inner loop. .some() check also replaced with .has(). Archaeological plaque placed.

Debug probe stale-state read: capturing store = useKingdomStore.getState() before hydrateMood/hydrateAgentStates then logging store.agentStates shows PRE-call state, not post-call. After set(), the captured state snapshot is stale. Always re-call getState() to read post-hydration state.
THE_SITE port permanently 3033: package.json dev/start scripts updated. Port 3000 = THE_FOUNDRY (Vite, Claude's House). CLAUDE.md updated.
claude_house_activity.json path bug FIXED: cwd split at space in 'Claude's House'. Fixed via tab delimiter in claude-house-state.sh + IFS=$'\t' read pattern.
WS real-time agent state gap closed: ws.onmessage now processes data.liveData.agents_status. Previously agent states only updated every 15s via REST poll fallback.
Detail panel STATE label was frozen: TerritoryDetailPanel now subscribes to agentStates — useKingdomStore((s) => s.agentStates) — so STATE label updates in real-time.
CHRONICLE to production: /tokens/lifetime added to push script + PartyKitLiveData interface updated + tryPartyKitFallback passes tokens_lifetime to buildMerged.
Push script heredoc injection hardened: shell vars no longer expanded inside Python triple-quoted strings. All JSON written to temp files, Python reads with json.load(open(...)).
THE_SITE_GRIMOIRE stale since 2026-02-28. All synthwave patches (S161-163), ring/emissive system, Zustand refactor NOT indexed. Needs reindex (Brandon: maker.html → THE_SITE_GRIMOIRE → forge).

root_cause_confirmed: H2 — color physics. EMISSIVE_FLOOR=0.18 insufficient for dark-hued territory emissives (#7000ff, #9b30ff) in void scene. Bumped to 0.35.
